Credentials

Certifications & Recognition

The knowledge and credentials behind every BhummiVastu consultation — built through years of dedicated study, practice, and continuous learning.

Expertise

Areas of Deep Expertise

Vastu Acharya Minu Saini's knowledge spans traditional Vastu Shastra, Vedic Astrology, and the unique integration of both — developed through formal training and 5+ years of active practice.

Vastu Shastra — Advanced Directional Analysis

Deep training in the 16-zone Vastu framework, 45 energy fields, directional mapping, and non-demolition remedy systems for residential and commercial spaces.

Vedic Astrology (Jyotish)

Comprehensive study of Vedic birth chart analysis, Dasha systems, planetary periods, and their application to career, relationships, health, and life planning.

Astro-Vastu Integration

Specialised training in cross-referencing Jyotish birth charts with Vastu spatial analysis — the unique methodology behind the Astro-Vastu Premium service.

Traditional Vedic & Spiritual Sciences

Ongoing engagement with traditional Vedic texts, spiritual disciplines, and contemporary applications — ensuring consultations remain rooted in authentic tradition.

Certifications
